title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Mediterranean Relish
description: A keto-friendly dish featuring pan-seared sea bass topped with a flavorful Mediterranean relish, made with fresh herbs and tangy lemon.
instructions: Rinse the sea bass fillets under cold water, pat them dry with a paper towel, and season with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the sea bass fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, prepare the Mediterranean relish by combining the lemon juice, garlic, parsley, oregano, red onion, olives, and capers in a bowl.
Once the fish is done, remove it from the oven and top each fillet with a spoonful of the Mediterranean relish.
